name: P.b. & J.specials
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the thawed bread dough on a floured surface.
2. Spread an even layer of melted butter over the dough.
3. Spread peanut butter evenly across the butter.
4. Drizzle jelly over the peanut butter.
5. Sprinkle chopped peanuts on top.
6. Place in a preheated oven set to 375°F (190°C).
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and slice.
A great after-school special!
